name: IRC_TN_JOBS_TL
description: Translation Table for storing flattened strings per Job

columns.Name: TN_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Part of the Primary Key for this table.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: Stores the Title for this Requisition. This is the title that is published to external/internal candidates.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the External Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DESC_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the External Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_SHORT_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the External Short Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_RESP
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the External Responsibilities for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_RESP_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the External Responsibilities for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_QUAL
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the External Qualifications for this Requisition

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_QUAL_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the External Qualifications for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXT_EMPLOYER_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the  external employer description of the Requisition from IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B.EXT_EMPLOYER_DESC_ID/IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B/IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_TL Tables

columns.Name: EXT_ORGANIZATION_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the external organization description of the Requisition from IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B.EXT_ORGANIZATION_DESC_ID /IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B/IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_TL Tables.

columns.Name: FULL_PART_TIME_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the full time part time meaning for the Requisition.Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.FULL_PART_TIME and HCM_LOOKUPS(FULL_PART_TIME)

columns.Name: SALARY_FREQUENCY_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the salary frequency meaning . Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.SALARY_FREQUENCY_CODE and HCM_LOOKUPS(CMP_SALARY_BASIS)

columns.Name: SALARY_CURRENCY_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the salary currency information. Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.SALARY_CURRENCY_CODE and FND_CURRENCIES

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_NAME
columns.Comments: Used to store the organization name of the requistion.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the name of the Job Family.Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.JOB_FAMILY_ID, PER_JOB_FAMILY_F/PER_JOB_FAMILY_F_TL.JOB_FAMILY_NAME

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the Job Function Meaning . Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.JOB_FUNCTION_CODE and HCM_LOOKUPS(JOB_FUNCTION_CODE)

columns.Name: REGULAR_TEMPORARY_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores whether the opening is for a regular or temporary job . Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.REGULAR_TEMPORARY and HCM_LOOKUPS(REGULAR_TEMPORARY)

columns.Name: WORKPLACE_TYPE_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the Workplace type value of the Requisition . Derived from  IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.WORKPLACE_TYPE_CODE and HCM_LOOKUPS(ORA_IRC_WORKPLACE_TYPE)

columns.Name: TRAVEL_FREQUENCY_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the travel frequency value of the Requisition .Derived from   IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID and HRT_WORK_PREFERENCE_ITEMS_V.NAT_TRAVEL_FREQUENCY

columns.Name: WORK_HOURS_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the Work Hours of the  Requisition .Derived from   IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID , HRT_WORK_PREFERENCE_ITEMS_V.WORK_HOURS and HCM_LOOKUPS (HRT_WORK_HOURS)

columns.Name: WORK_DAYS_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the Work Hours of the  Requisition .Derived from   IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID , HRT_WORK_PREFERENCE_ITEMS_V.WORK_DAYS and HCM_LOOKUPS (HRT_WORK_DAYS)

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_FREQ_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the Working Frequency of the Requisition  .Derived from   IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.POSITION_ID , HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F.STANDARD_WORKING_HOURS and HCM_LOOKUPS (FREQUENCY)

columns.Name: OVERTIME_STATUS_MEANING
columns.Comments: Stores the Overtime status of the Requisition  .Derived from   IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID , PER_JOB_LEG_F.INFORMATION1

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
